title: YTP: Traitorous Link's Awesome Adventure (pt 2)
description:
The epic conclusion!

The king and Zelda find Link and Ganon is all too happy to betray him. It's a good thing Link found a magic balloon! Or is it?

The song I used throughout it is Dogs of War from the game Medal of Honor: European Assault.

I've been experimenting with using MS paint to animate its pretty good (for ms paint anyway)
